title: cccreate+
description: a small modpack with cc and create
body: Cccreate+ is a modpack that includes cc:tweakt and Create as its main mods. While other modpacks drastically alter Minecraft, this modpack aims to maintain a vanilla feel. With Create and its addons, you can have fun automating tasks, and with cc:tweakt and its addons, you can even control them from afar. Some of the included addons are, for example: Advanced Peripherals, Create Enchantment Industry, More Peripherals, and a few more.
